person.name: Roger Kerdeston
person.alternateName: Sir Lord Roger de Kerdeston 1st Kerdeston Sheriff of Norfolk & Suffolk , Governor of Norwich Castle and Maud Bateman

memoryArtifacts.headline: The river Yare at Langley with Buckenham Watermill and Beauchamp Arms. Reproduction of a charcoal-on-paper drawing by Susan Laughlin.
The remains of Langley Abbey, Norfolk. Date: 13 October 2011. Photo by JohnArmaghof Wikiwand.
The barn of Langley Abbey. Photo from Wikiwand article on the abbey.
Engraving on behalf of Langley Abbey, Norfolk by E. Roberts from a drawing by JS Cotman. From excursions through Norfolk in 1818.
Remains of the abbey Langley, a Premonstratensian abbey, was founded in 1195 and dissolved in 1536. Photo taken 6 June 2009 by Evelyn Simak.
Langley Abbey. The restored Cellarium, inside are lights to highlight the room. Photo taken 23 April 2011 by Ashley Dace. Wikimedia Commons.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger Kerdeston於大約1280年出生時，他的父親William Kerdeston32歲，母親Margaret Gant or de Gant29歲。他與Maud Bateman結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1337年7月1日在英國素福爾可海萊斯沃斯享年58歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可明日香。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger Kerdeston于大约1280年出生时，他的父亲William Kerdeston32岁，母亲Margaret Gant or de Gant29岁。他与Maud Bateman结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1337年7月1日在英国素福爾可海萊斯沃斯享年58岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可明日香。

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger Kerdeston was born about 1280, his father, William Kerdeston, was 32 and his mother, Margaret Gant or de Gant, was 29. He married Maud Bateman. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 1 July 1337, in Halesworth, Suffolk, England, at the age of 58, and was buried in Langley, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger Kerdeston est né environ 1280, son père, William Kerdeston, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Margaret Gant or de Gant, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Maud Bateman. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 1 juillet 1337, à Halesworth, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Langley, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger Kerdeston um 1280 geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Kerdeston 32 und seine Mutter Margaret Gant or de Gant 29. Er hat Maud Bateman geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 1. Juli 1337 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Halesworth, Suffolk, England und wurde in Langley, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Kerdeston è nato il circa 1280, il suo padre, William Kerdeston, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Gant or de Gant, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Maud Bateman. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 1 luglio 1337, nel Halesworth, Suffolk, England, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolto a Langley, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger Kerdestonが約1280年に生まれた時，父William Kerdestonは32歳，母Margaret Gant or de Gantは29歳であった。Maud Batemanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1337年7月1日にイギリススフォルクヘイレスウオルスで58歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクラングリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger Kerdeston(이)가 대략 1280년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Kerdeston(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Gant or de Gant(은)는 29세였다. 그는 Maud Bateman(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1337년 7월 1일 영국 수폴크 헤일스워스에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 랭글리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Kerdeston nasceu aproximadamente 1280, seu pai, William Kerdeston, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Gant or de Gant, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud Bateman. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1 de julho de 1337, em Halesworth, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Langley, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger Kerdeston родился около 1280 г., его отцу по имени William Kerdeston было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Gant or de Gant, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud Bateman. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 1 июля 1337 г. в местности хэлесворт, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности лангли, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger Kerdeston nació aproximadamente 1280, su papá, William Kerdeston, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Margaret Gant or de Gant, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Maud Bateman. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 1 de julio de 1337, en Halesworth, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultado en Langley, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
